title: Day 6 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these three sentences:  

Sentence 1 - なんで　がっこう　へ　きますか。 (nande gakkoo e kimas ka) = How do you come to school?

Sentence 2 - じてんしゃで　きます。 (jitensha de kimas) = I come by bicycle

Sentence 2 - あるいて　きます。 (aruite kimas) = I walk here

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.
